body:
{"answer": "# Configuring a Lambda Function URL

You can configure a Lambda function URL using the AWS Lambda console, AWS CLI, or CloudFormation. Here's how:

## Using the AWS Console [Source 6]

1. Open the Functions page of the Lambda console
2. Choose the name of the function you want to create the function URL for
3. Choose the **Configuration** tab, then select **Function URL**
4. Choose **Create function URL**
5. For **Auth type**, choose either:
   - `AWS_IAM` (for IAM-based access control)
   - `NONE` (for public access)
6. **(Optional)** Select **Configure cross-origin resource sharing (CORS)** and configure CORS settings for your function URL
7. Choose **Save**

This creates a function URL for the unpublished version of your function, and the URL will appear in the Function overview section of the console.

## Using the AWS CLI [Source 9]

Run the following command to create a function URL for an existing Lambda function:

```
aws lambda create-function-url-config --function-name <function-name> --auth-type [AWS_IAM|NONE]
```

**Note:** The function must already exist to create a function URL via AWS CLI.

## Using CloudFormation [Source 2]

You can also add a function URL to a CloudFormation template. Refer to the AWS CloudFormation documentation for the specific syntax.

## Key Configuration Details [Source 3]

- Lambda automatically generates a **unique, permanent URL endpoint** that never changes
- Function URLs support **IPv4 and IPv6** (dual stack-enabled)
- You can apply function URLs to any **function alias or the unpublished function version** — not to other function versions
- Function URLs use **resource-based policies** for security and access control", "sources": [{"service": "lambda", "page_title": "Creating and managing Lambda function URLs - AWS Lambda", "heading": "Creating and managing Lambda function URLs", "source_url": "https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/urls-configuration.html", "distance": 0.1267}, {"service": "lambda", "page_title": "Invoking Lambda function URLs - AWS Lambda", "heading": "Invoking Lambda function URLs", "source_url": "https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/urls-invocation.html", "distance": 0.199}, {"service": "lambda", "page_title": "Configuring AWS Lambda functions - AWS Lambda", "heading": "Configuring AWS Lambda functions", "source_url": "https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-functions.html", "distance": 0.2626}]}
